<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\CannotSignPayload; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\Ecdsa\ConversionFailed; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\InvalidKeyProvided; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\Key; interface Signer { /** * Returns the algorithm id * * @return non-empty-string */ public function algorithmId(): string; /** * Creates a hash for the given payload * * @param non-empty-string $payload * * @return non-empty-string * * @throws CannotSignPayload When payload signing fails. * @throws InvalidKeyProvided When issue key is invalid/incompatible. * @throws ConversionFailed When signature could not be converted. */ public function sign(string $payload, Key $key): string; /** * Returns if the expected hash matches with the data and key * * @param non-empty-string $expected * @param non-empty-string $payload * * @throws InvalidKeyProvided When issue key is invalid/incompatible. * @throws ConversionFailed When signature could not be converted. */ public function verify(string $expected, string $payload, Key $key): bool; }
